description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, deploy-staging, and deploy-production. Add a job_test in the test stage using the node:latest image that runs `npm i` then `npm test`. Add a job_build in the build stage using node:latest, limited to the dev, staging, and master branches, that runs `npm i` and `npm run build` and stores the build directory as an artifact. Add a job_staging in the deploy-staging stage using ruby:latest, limited to the staging and master branches, that installs the dpl gem and deploys to the Heroku staging app git-staging with `dpl --provider=heroku --api-key=$HEROKU_TOKEN --app=git-staging --skip_cleanup` and sets the environment name to staging. Add a job_deploy in the deploy-production stage using ruby:latest, runs only on tags, that installs dpl and deploys to the Heroku production app git-production with `dpl --provider=heroku --api-key=$HEROKU_TOKEN --app=git-production --skip_cleanup` and sets the environment name to production.
